description: Embeddable content widgets for SEO/travel writers. Use these in blog posts, articles, and travel guides.

plan_cta_button.description: Call-to-action button to plan a trip with Kontour AI
plan_cta_button.html: ✈️ Plan Your {DESTINATION} Trip with AI

destination_quick_facts.description: Compact destination facts card for articles
destination_quick_facts.html:
📍 {DESTINATION} Quick Facts

🌡️ Best Season{BEST_SEASON}
💰 Daily Budget{DAILY_BUDGET}
💱 Currency{CURRENCY}
🛂 Visa{VISA_INFO}
🗣️ Language{LANGUAGE}
Plan this trip →
destination_quick_facts.markdown:
### 📍 {DESTINATION} Quick Facts
| | |
|---|---|
| 🌡️ Best Season | {BEST_SEASON} |
| 💰 Daily Budget | {DAILY_BUDGET} |
| 💱 Currency | {CURRENCY} |
| 🛂 Visa | {VISA_INFO} |
| 🗣️ Language | {LANGUAGE} |

[Plan this trip →](https://kontour.ai?dest={DESTINATION_SLUG})

itinerary_preview_iframe.description: Interactive itinerary preview embed for kontour.ai
itinerary_preview_iframe.html: <iframe src="https://kontour.ai/embed/itinerary/{TRIP_ID}" width="100%" height="500" style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>

variables.TRIP_ID: Trip ID or share token from kontour.ai

cost_comparison_table.description: Budget vs mid-range vs luxury comparison for a destination
cost_comparison_table.html:
💰 {DESTINATION} Daily Costs (per person)

🎒 Budget🏨 Mid-Range✨ Luxury
Accommodation${BUDGET_ACCOM}${MID_ACCOM}${LUX_ACCOM}
Food${BUDGET_FOOD}${MID_FOOD}${LUX_FOOD}
Activities${BUDGET_ACT}${MID_ACT}${LUX_ACT}
Total/Day${BUDGET_TOTAL}${MID_TOTAL}${LUX_TOTAL}

Get a personalized budget →
cost_comparison_table.markdown:
### 💰 {DESTINATION} Daily Costs (per person)
| | 🎒 Budget | 🏨 Mid-Range | ✨ Luxury |
|---|---|---|---|
| Accommodation | ${BUDGET_ACCOM} | ${MID_ACCOM} | ${LUX_ACCOM} |
| Food | ${BUDGET_FOOD} | ${MID_FOOD} | ${LUX_FOOD} |
| Activities | ${BUDGET_ACT} | ${MID_ACT} | ${LUX_ACT} |
| **Total/Day** | **${BUDGET_TOTAL}** | **${MID_TOTAL}** | **${LUX_TOTAL}** |

[Get a personalized budget →](https://kontour.ai?dest={DESTINATION_SLUG})

chat_widget.description: Embeddable 'Ask Kontour' chat widget for travel sites
chat_widget.html: <script src="https://kontour.ai/widget/chat.js" data-position="bottom-right" data-theme="light" data-accent="#2563eb" data-greeting="Hi! I can help you plan your trip. Where would you like to go?" async></script>
chat_widget.note: Widget loads asynchronously. Customize with data-position (bottom-right|bottom-left), data-theme (light|dark), data-accent (hex color).
